overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character navigating through a heavily polluted urban environment with dense orange smog. The character ascends stairs, traverses covered walkways and open plazas, and walks along city streets lined with futuristic architecture and parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete stairwell ascending to street level

events.description: exiting enclosed stairwell into open air at top of stairs
passing through metal gate structure at stairwell exit

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs following another pedestrian toward the surface

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing ascending stairs ahead of ego

entered.detail: dark concrete walls with metal handrails flanking the stairs
illuminated vertical poster with purple and yellow graphics
metal frame structure marking the exit of the stairwell
tree visible through heavy orange haze at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit concrete stairwell with the character ascending stairs. An illuminated poster is visible on the right wall. As the character reaches the top, the scene transitions to open air with a tree silhouette visible through the dense orange smog, passing through a metal gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with metal railings and overhead vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway passing pedestrians moving in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and red cap walking toward the camera

entered.detail: vertical metal bars forming the sides of the covered walkway
tree branches extending over the walkway from above

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered walkway with metal railings on both sides. Tree branches extend overhead, partially obscuring the orange sky. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, including one in a white tank top passing close to the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated pedestrian walkway with descent to street level

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open elevated area with full sky visibility
beginning descent down wide concrete stairs toward street level

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway and descending stairs toward the plaza below

entered.detail: mature tree with full canopy visible in the open air
multi-story building with grid-patterned glass facade visible through haze
wide concrete stairs leading down to the street level plaza

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens to a wide elevated area with a large tree on the left and a modern glass building visible in the distance through the orange smog. The character descends wide concrete stairs toward street level, with other pedestrians walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with curved glass architecture and steps

events.description: reaching street level plaza with distinctive curved glass structures
passing into shadow of tall building with dramatic light beam cutting through smog

agents.ego_description: navigating through the plaza past architectural features and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead of ego toward the street

entered.detail: arched glass and metal structure with curved roof line
wide terraced steps in the open plaza area
tall building barely visible through the dense orange smog

segments.scene_description: The character reaches street level in an open plaza featuring a distinctive curved glass building on the left. The plaza has wide concrete steps and a large tree in the center. A skyscraper looms in the foggy distance, and a digital billboard becomes visible on the right as the character approaches the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with parked futuristic vehicles and digital billboards

events.description: entering street with parked cars and urban traffic infrastructure
dramatic light beam from high-rise building creating spotlight effect on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along city street sidewalk past parked vehicles and street furniture

notable_agents.action: futuristic yellow sports car parked at the curb with illuminated accents

entered.detail: sleek sports cars with glowing accents parked along the street
elevated walkway crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city street lined with parked futuristic vehicles, including a prominent yellow sports car. A large digital billboard displaying a clown face advertisement becomes prominent on the right. The street features dramatic lighting with beams cutting through the orange smog, and an overhead pedestrian bridge is visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, dimly lit interior out into a sprawling, smog-choked cyberpunk cityscape. It begins with the character ascending a concrete stairwell past an illuminated poster, moving through a metal gate as the scene opens into a dense orange haze. As the camera progresses through a covered walkway lined with metal railings and overhead branches, it passes oncoming pedestrians before emerging onto a wide elevated plaza featuring a distant glass building. The perspective then descends wide concrete stairs to street level, where the environment expands to reveal a curved glass structure and a looming skyscraper shrouded in fog. Finally, the movement flows onto a city street lined with futuristic vehicles and a prominent yellow sports car, passing under dramatic light beams and a large digital billboard of a clown face.
